inferred_expected_behavior: Implement the requested task without expanding scope: Generate a conservative QIRA task packet from local PR diff metadata.
Preserve existing public claim boundaries and do not add verification, security-certification, quality-guarantee, production-readiness, deployment-approval, or action-authorization claims.
Source changes should preserve documented behavior unless the task explicitly states a behavior change.
Test changes should cover the intended behavior and avoid replacing evidence with unsupported claims.
Documentation changes should match implementation boundaries and limitations.
Do not deploy, publish, upload packages, submit registry metadata, or run external actions from this packet.
known_limits: QIRA-5 reads local diff text or changed-file metadata only.
QIRA-5 does not call GitHub APIs, run git commands, apply patches, execute tests, deploy, upload, or publish.
Generated packets can support review intake, but they do not verify code, certify security, guarantee quality, or authorize release actions.
